news.summary: Maumee, Ohio-based Therma-Tru® Doors has been honored with the prestigious 2025 Green GOOD DESIGN® award for its dedication to offering sustainable design solutions for homes nationwide. The award, bestowed by The European Centre for Architecture Art Design and Urban Studies and The Chicago Athenaeum Museum of Architecture and Design, recognizes outstanding achievements in sustainable design. The Green GOOD DESIGN award program aims to highlight leading sustainable design initiatives globally. Therma-Tru® Doors' commitment to sustainable design was acknowledged with this accolade, signifying its leadership in the industry. The award underscores the company's excellence in sustainable design practices.
news.headline: Therma-Tru Doors wins Green GOOD DESIGN® Award for energy-efficient options; 99.8% of Therma-Tru fiberglass doors are ENERGY STAR® certified.

news.summary: A U.S.-based LNG company, Excelerate Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EE), declared that Steven Kobos, the President and CEO, is set to engage in a panel discussion on the U.S. LNG forecast and conduct individual investor meetings at the Jefferies Energy Conference in Kiawah Island, South Carolina. The participation dates are scheduled for June 10 to 11, 2025. Excelerate Energy, Inc. specializes in LNG and plays a significant role in the market.
news.headline: Excelerate Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EE) to take part in Jefferies Energy Conference on June 10-11, 2025 in Kiawah Island, SC. President Steven Kobos to discuss U.S. LNG outlook.

news.summary: NGL Energy Partners LP, based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal year 2025. The company also provided guidance for fiscal year 2026. No specific numbers were provided in the rephrased content.
news.headline: NGL Energy Partners LP released Q4 & full year 2025 financial results and guidance for fiscal 2026 in Tulsa, Oklahoma.

news.summary: At the recent Zevra stockholders meeting, Wendy L. Dixon, Ph.D. and Tamara A. Favorito were both re-elected to the company's board of directors. This decision was made by the stockholders and shows continued support for the expertise and leadership these individuals bring to the board. Their re-election emphasizes the confidence the stockholders have in their ability to contribute to the company's success.
news.headline: Zevra announces results of 2025 meeting: Wendy L. Dixon, Ph.D. & Tamara A. Favorito re-elected to Board of Directors.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on May 29, 2025, Fospha introduced its latest research Playbook that highlights YouTube and Demand Gen as crucial factors for achieving scalable and profitable growth this year. The platform emphasizes the importance of these components in helping brands meet the growing demand for efficiency and effectiveness. The playbook provides insights and strategies for leveraging YouTube and Demand Gen, showcasing their impact on driving successful marketing campaigns. It serves as a valuable resource for companies looking to boost their performance, with the aim of capitalizing on these key drivers to achieve significant growth.
news.headline: Fospha study finds YouTube & Demand Gen drive 145% revenue growth for brands. New playbook highlights profit potential.

news.summary: Located in Freiburg, Germany, Black Forest Labs, a prominent AI research lab in Europe, has unveiled FLUX.1 Kontext - a cutting-edge suite of image generation models. This latest release offers advanced in-context generating and editing features. With Kontext, users can effortlessly create, enhance, and refine images using text and visual inputs, eliminating the requirement for intricate editing processes or fine-tuning. FLUX.1 Kontext targets creators, developers, and businesses looking to streamline their image generation workflows.
news.headline: Black Forest Labs unveils FLUX.1 Kontext for image generation and editing without finetuning - aims at creators & enterprises.

news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 3.8%, which is the lowest it has been in over a decade. This decrease in unemployment has also been accompanied by a rise in job creation, with over 200,000 new jobs added in the last month alone. These positive numbers have been attributed to a strong economy and steady growth in various sectors. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook and the potential for further improvements in the job market.
news.headline: Paysign, Inc. will attend MicroCap Rodeo Spring Conference to present their latest updates and trends.

news.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company revealed new executive leadership appointments, effective June 16, 2025. Shane Grant, aged 50, will assume the newly established position of Chief Operating Officer, Americas at Colgate-Palmolive, with responsibility for North America and Latin America regions. Grant, known as an esteemed figure in the industry, has consistently delivered impressive outcomes. He will transition from his previous role at Group Danone to take on this new challenge.
news.headline: Colgate-Palmolive appoints Shane Grant as Chief Operating Officer, Americas, starting June 16, 2025. Grant, 50, joins from Group Danone.

news.summary: In Honolulu, Hawaii, Toby Mitchell from Ali'iolani Elementary School has been honored nationally for his groundbreaking classroom techniques that have led to remarkable student performance and elevated standards. The recognition was announced on May 29, 2025. Toby Mitchell's exceptional efforts have earned him accolades from Curriculum Associates.
news.headline: Hawai'i teacher Toby Mitchell recognized as one of Curriculum Associates' 2025 Class of Extraordinary Educators™.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Johnson City, Tennessee, Teddy Laboratory, a subsidiary of Tigermed, announced the signing of a strategic partnership with LabConnect, LLC, a prominent global provider of central laboratory services. The agreement entails collaborating to establish a comprehensive laboratory service system.
news.headline: Teddy Laboratory partners with LabConnect to enhance lab services, marking a new collaboration in the industry.

news.summary: Danaher has recently announced a collaboration with AstraZeneca to expand precision medicine initiatives, which involves advancing AI-driven diagnostics. The partnership intends to establish a platform for prompt research, development, and launch of diagnostic solutions. Danaher's Centers will play a key role in this collaboration.
news.headline: Danaher partners with AstraZeneca to scale precision medicine, focusing on AI-powered diagnostics, aiming for rapid development and commercialization, leading to advancements in precision medicine.

news.summary: The President and CEO of Marriott International, Inc., Anthony Capuano, is set to address the 2025 Morgan Stanley Travel and Leisure Conference on Tuesday, June 3. The event will take place in Bethesda, Md., and Mr. Capuano's speech is scheduled for around this time. Marriott International, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol MAR. The conference is expected to attract a significant audience, including investors, industry professionals, and media representatives.
news.headline: Marriott CEO to speak at Morgan Stanley Travel and Leisure Conference on June 3. Details to be webcasted.

news.summary: In Santa Cruz, California, on May 29, 2025, West Coast Community Bank (WCCB) welcomed Diane Heyden as their new Senior Vice President and Small Business Administration (SBA) Lending Director. Heyden's role will involve overseeing the Bank's SBA lending operations across four counties.
news.headline: West Coast Community Bank appoints Diane Heyden as SVP, Director of SBA Lending, expanding services across four counties.

news.summary: In Emeryville, California on May 29, 2025, Amyris, Inc., a prominent synthetic biology company, has successfully obtained Ingredion's 31% ownership in the RealSweet Joint Venture. This acquisition grants Amyris complete control over the venture, solidifying its position as a key player in industrial biotechnology.
news.headline: Amyris acquires Ingredion's 31% stake in RealSweet JV, taking full ownership of Brazilian fermentation plant. News via PRNewswire.

news.summary: Today in Menlo Park, California, the board of directors of Meta Platforms, Inc. (Nasdaq: META) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.525 per share for both Class A and Class B common stock. This dividend will be paid on June 26, 2025, to stockholders of the company.
news.headline: Meta Platforms, Inc. (Nasdaq: META) declares $0.525 quarterly cash dividend per share on Class A and B stock, payable on June 26, 2025.

news.summary: Amyris, Inc., a synthetic biology company, has acquired full ownership of a precision fermentation plant in Brazil. This move occurred on May 29, 2025. By taking over the plant, Amyris now has complete control over its operations. In a separate deal, Ingredion has secured exclusive access to the fermented Reb M technology. This agreement grants Ingredion sole rights to utilize this technology. Amyris is based in Emeryville, California, while Ingredion is headquartered in Westchester, Illinois. The terms of the acquisition and exclusivity deal were not disclosed.
news.headline: Amyris acquires full ownership of fermentation plant, while Ingredion gains exclusivity to fermented Reb M technology.

news.summary: A global flavor leader, McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE: MKC) based in Hunt Valley, Md., announced a conference call and webcast to discuss its second quarter 2025 financial results on June 26, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Brendan Foley will address the participants.
news.headline: McCormick & Company (NYSE: MKC) to report Q2 2025 financial results on June 26, 2025 at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.summary: Concord Healthcare Group Co., Ltd. (Concord Healthcare), a subsidiary of Concord Medical Services Holdings Limited, announced on May 29, 2025, that it is listed on the Main Board of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited (HKSE). Concord Healthcare is a part of Concord Medical Services Holdings Limited, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker symbol CCM.
news.headline: Concord Healthcare releases Proton Therapy Large Model. Subsidiary of Concord Medical Services Holdings Ltd. (NYSE: CCM).

news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - In a recent announcement made on May 29, 2025, Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) revealed the addition of Jonathan Pruzan to its board of directors. Alongside this appointment, Pruzan is set to join the board's risk committee. The corporation expressed its satisfaction in welcoming Jon Pruzan to the Truist board, marking a significant development in their governance structure.
news.headline: Truist adds Jonathan Pruzan to board of directors, also on risk committee. $TFC. Welcome Pruzan!

news.summary: Beverage alcohol company Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ) will release its financial results for the first quarter ending May 31, 2025, on July 1, 2025, after the U.S. markets close. The report, along with financial tables and additional materials, will be available on the company’s investor relations website at ir.cbrands.com. President and CEO Bill Newlands, and CFO Garth Hankinson will lead a live conference call with analysts on July 2, 2025, at 10:30 a.m. ET. The call will cover financial results, operational performance, strategic initiatives, and future outlook.
news.headline: Constellation Brands will release Q1 2026 financial results on July 1, 2025 and host a conference call on July 2, 2025 at 10:30 AM ET.

news.summary: Cycurion, Inc. (Nasdaq: CYCU), a prominent player in IT cybersecurity solutions and AI, recently disclosed that on May 22, 2025, it was issued a deficiency notification letter by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. The notification highlighted that the company did not comply with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) due to its failure to promptly submit its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ending March 31, 2025. This information was conveyed through the Form NT 10-Q, which was lodged with the SEC on May 15, 2025. Nasdaq's Listing Rule mandates that companies listed on the exchange must submit all necessary periodic reports to the SEC within the stipulated timelines.
news.headline: Cycurion, Inc. received a deficiency notification from Nasdaq for delayed filing of Form 10-Q, not in compliance with Listing Rule 5250(c)(1).

news.summary: In a recent report, it was outlined that the global economy is projected to contract by 4.4% in 2020 due to the ongoing pandemic. This marks a significant downturn from the previous forecast of a 3% decline. The report also highlighted that global trade is expected to decline by 9.2% this year, with advanced economies experiencing a 8.3% contraction, while emerging markets and developing economies seeing a 3.3% decrease in their GDP. The report further noted that the global economy is anticipated to rebound by 5.2% in 2021, contingent on the success of efforts to contain the virus and implement supportive policies. However, it cautioned that the recovery could be uneven, with economies that rely heavily on tourism and hospitality sectors facing a more protracted rebound. This data underscores the severe impact of the pandemic on the global economy, indicating the need for continued cooperation and intervention to mitigate the effects of the crisis.
news.headline: Santander plans to launch a stablecoin and retail crypto services.

news.summary: In a recent update, Ellington Financial Inc. (NYSE: EFC) revealed an estimated book value per share of common stock at $13.47 as of April 30, 2025. This calculation considers the impact of the latest monthly dividend amounting to $0.13 per common stock share, which was disbursed on May 27, 2025, to shareholders listed on April 30, 2025. It is important to note that projected book value per common share remains susceptible to change.
news.headline: Ellington Financial's estimated book value per share is $13.47 as of April 30, 2025, including a $0.13 dividend.

news.summary: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL) announced its Q1 results after the closing bell on Thursday. The report revealed an adjusted earnings of 62 cents per share, surpassing the estimated 61 cents. The quarterly revenue stood at $1.9 billion, beating the consensus forecast of $1.88 billion. This strong performance indicates a positive start for Marvell in the current fiscal year. To learn more about Marvell's financial results and upcoming events, interested parties can access the full report on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Marvell Technology (NASDAQ: MRVL) beats Q1 earnings with 62 cents per share on $1.9 billion revenue. Stock slips.

news.summary: A recent study found that nearly 40% of young adults aged 18-25 are experiencing high levels of anxiety due to the ongoing pandemic. The research surveyed over 2,000 individuals in this age group and found that 37% reported feeling anxious frequently or constantly. Additionally, the study revealed that 62% of respondents were concerned about the lasting impact of the pandemic on their mental health. These findings highlight the significant emotional toll that the current crisis is taking on young adults.
news.headline: Gap's sales exceed expectations, led by Old Navy's growth, with a significant increase in revenue.

news.summary: Castle is set to unveil groundbreaking new findings to improve patient care for those with cutaneous melanoma and uveal melanoma during the ASCO conference in 2025. The data being shared is aimed at revolutionizing the clinical approach for these melanoma types, potentially impacting numerous patients worldwide.
news.headline: New data at ASCO 2025 shows DecisionDx®-Melanoma improves risk stratification and survival outcomes for melanoma patients.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Acuity Inc. (NYSE: AYI) announced their plan to reveal the fiscal 2025 third quarter results on June 26, 2025, at 6:00 a.m. Eastern Time (ET). This will be succeeded by a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. The call will be helmed by Neil Ashe, the Chief Executive Officer of Acuity Inc.
news.headline: Acuity Inc. (NYSE: AYI) to announce Fiscal 2025 third-quarter results on June 26, 2025, 6:00 a.m. ET with a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET. CEO Neil Ashe to lead the call.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Charlotte, North Carolina, DENTSPLY SIRONA Inc. made an announcement via GLOBE NEWSWIRE that Matthew E. Garth will assume the role of Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, starting from May 30, 2025. Dentsply Sirona, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol XRAY, disclosed the appointment of Garth to this key position.
news.headline: Dentsply Sirona appoints Matthew E. Garth as CFO on May 30, 2025, per company announcement. #XRAY #finance
Blaize to participate in 1st Annual Consumer & Technology Conference by D.A. Davidson.

news.summary: Bowen Acquisition Corp (NASDAQ: BOWN), a SPAC, recently disclosed that on May 28, 2025, it was notified by the Nasdaq Stock Market that it was not in compliance with NASDAQ's Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) due to the non-submission of its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the fiscal quarter ending on March 31, 2025. NASDAQ has set a deadline of July 28, 2025, for the company to present a plan to rectify this issue. Should NASDAQ approve the proposed plan, Bowen Acquisition Corp could be granted an extension of up to 180 days until November 17, 2025, to meet the compliance requirements.
news.headline: Bowen Acquisition Corp (NASDAQ: BOWN) notified of non-compliance with NASDAQ Listing Rule for missing Quarterly Report. Company has until July 28, 2025 to submit plan to regain compliance, can get extension up to 180 days if approved.

news.summary: Amplify Energy Corp. revealed that it has finished its semi-annual borrowing base reassessment, confirming the borrowing base at $145 million. The next reassessment is scheduled for the fourth quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Amplify Energy Corp. maintains $145 million borrowing base following successful redetermination; next review in Q4 2025.

news.summary: In an upcoming Olympics event, a total of 11,000 athletes from 206 countries will be participating. The games will feature 339 events in 33 different sports. The event is expected to draw in over 3.5 billion viewers worldwide. The organizing committee has invested over $15 billion in preparing for the games, which will take place in a newly constructed stadium with a seating capacity of 80,000. Additionally, approximately 50,000 volunteers will be assisting with the event to ensure its smooth execution.
news.headline: Gap surpasses sales forecast, boosted by Old Navy's solid growth..

news.summary: Dell Technologies Inc (NYSE: DELL) released its Q1 financial results after market close on Thursday. The company posted a total revenue of $23.38 billion, surpassing the consensus estimate of $23.14 billion. Adjusted earnings stood at $1.55 per share, falling short of the expected $1.69 per share. Dell reported a 5% increase in total revenue year-over-year. The Infrastructure Solutions Group recorded revenue of $10.3 billion, marking a 12% increase from the previous year. Meanwhile, the Client Solutions Group reported revenue of $12.5 billion. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Dell Q1 earnings: $23.38B revenue beats estimates, $1.55 EPS misses, 5% YoY growth, $10.3B ISG revenue (12% YoY).

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Femasys Inc. (NASDAQ: FEMY) revealed plans for an underwritten public offering of its common stock in an effort to raise funds. The biomedical company, known for its innovations in women's health, aims to offer shares with an option for underwriters to acquire up to 15% additional shares. Furthermore, existing institutional stockholders alongside some directors and officers have shown intent to partake in a private placement by purchasing common stock. Femasys focuses on addressing unmet needs in women's health globally through a range of in-office therapeutic and diagnostic products.
news.headline: Femasys plans public stock offering and private placement with existing shareholders, granting underwriters option for more shares.

news.summary: Today in Las Vegas, Care Career, Inc. revealed the successful acquisition of four major healthcare staffing companies. This includes Alliant Personnel Resources in August 2024, Amare Medical Network, and MedUS Healthcare in March 2025. For further details, visit www.carecareer.com.
news.headline: Care Career, Inc. acquires 4 healthcare staffing firms in strategic move for growth. Includes Alliant Personnel Resources, Amare Medical Network, and MedUS Healthcare.

news.summary: Ferguson Enterprises Inc. (NYSE: FERG; LSE: FERG) declared a dividend of $0.83 per share on May 29, 2025. The dividend payment timetable is as follows: Ex-dividend date is June 20, 2025, record date is June 20, 2025, currency election deadline for Depositary Interest holders is July 9, 2025, and the payment date is set for August 6, 2025. The completion of cross-border share movements between the U.K. and the U.S. is subject to further verification.
news.headline: Ferguson Enterprises Inc. declares $0.83 per share dividend on May 29, 2025. Payment date set for August 6, 2025.

news.summary: BrightView Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BV), a top commercial landscaping services firm in the U.S., revealed that its management personnel will be present at upcoming investor conferences. On June 3, 2025, Dale Asplund, President and CEO, alongside Chris Stoczko, VP of Finance & Investor Relations, will be at the William Blair 2025 Investor Conference in Chicago, Illinois. The session is scheduled for 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.headline: BrightView Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BV) to attend William Blair 2025 Investor Conference on June 3 in Chicago at 10:00 a.m. ET. Dale Asplund and Chris Stoczko to represent the company.
